completed_tasks.name: Plan Phase 2 with cross-AI review feedback incorporated

decisions.decision: Store scale as pixelsPerMm (unit-agnostic base) instead of pixelsPerUnit
decisions.rationale: Cross-AI review (Gemini) identified that changing globalUnit after calibration would silently corrupt stored pixelsPerUnit values. pixelsPerMm is unit-agnostic so setGlobalUnit only affects display, not stored calibration data.

decisions.decision: Move calibMode into Zustand scaleStore instead of module-level ref polling
decisions.rationale: Gemini flagged the 100ms setInterval polling of getCalibrationControls().getMode() as a reactive anti-pattern. calibMode: CalibMode added to ScaleState so Toolbar subscribes reactively via useScaleStore.

decisions.decision: ConfirmationToast is persistent — no auto-dismiss timer
decisions.rationale: Gemini noted 6s is too short for an estimator to pan/zoom to a second known dimension. Toast now stays until user clicks Verify/Dismiss or navigates to a different page.

next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase 2 in a fresh context window to execute all 3 plans (Wave 1: types+math+store, Wave 2: calibration interaction, Wave 3: status bar+verify+toast)
context_notes: Phase 2 planning is complete and verified. Three plans revised from the original set to incorporate Gemini's cross-AI review. All MEDIUM concerns addressed. Plan checker passed. Ready to execute.
